heading: Omitted
label: 1356a to 1356j Omitted
notes: CodificationSections were omitted. See sections 1356k and 1356 of this title.lSection 1356a, , , , authorized the President, for a period not to exceed , to carry out the provisions of the International Coffee Agreement, 1962.Pub. L. 89–23, § 379 Stat. 112section 1356a of this titleMay 22, 1965Section 1356c, , , , authorized delegation of Presidential powers and duties and required protection of consumer interests under sections 1356a to 1356e of this title.Pub. L. 89–23, § 479 Stat. 112May 22, 1965Section 1356d, , , , required the President to submit an annual report to Congress on the International Coffee Agreement, 1962.Pub.
